name: Knight
description: Stout, well-armored, predictable. Walks straight at the boss.
flavorText: Honour first. Survival second.

name: Rogue
description: Fast, fragile, fond of shortcuts and locked things.
flavorText: If they catch me, I deserved it.

name: Mage
description: Glass cannon. Big spells, brittle bones.
flavorText: Fireball solves most problems. Survival is a different one.

name: Cleric
description: Field medic for the party — heals wounded allies and rezzes the fallen. Light melee resistance, no offensive specialty.
flavorText: Faith is a weapon, and a bandage.

name: Necromancer
description: Raises defeated minions to fight for the party. Defected raises last until the day ends.
flavorText: Death is a waste of perfectly good labour.

name: Ranger
description: Ranged combatant. Fires arrows from a distance; switches to melee when the quiver runs dry.
flavorText: First arrow. Second arrow. Third arrow. Out.

name: Twitch Streamer
description: Streams the run live. Decisions polled to chat in real time. A killed streamer sometimes goes viral, summoning extra adventurers the next day.
flavorText: PogChamp the chest! PogChamp the chest!

name: Beast Master
description: Trained handler. Tames a single hostile minion mid-fight; the tamed beast follows and fights for them. Only one companion at a time — if it dies, they tame a replacement.
flavorText: Every beast was a person once, in their head.

name: Barbarian
description: Rage-fueled brawler. Damage scales as HP drops (up to 2x at near-death). Immune to fear and flee triggers — never retreats.
flavorText: Pain is just bad weather. You walk through it.

name: Monk
description: Unarmored, lightning-fast. ~30% chance to dodge incoming hits including traps. Strikes ignore half of minion defense.
flavorText: Be the wind around the blade.

name: Bard
description: Travelling performer. While alive, grants nearby party members +15% attack and +15% speed. Aura ends the moment they fall.
flavorText: Every chord, a small kindness.

name: Sir Aldric the Bold
description: Tournament champion warrior. Fights for glory and the kill credit.
flavorText: The boss kill is MINE.

name: Vexa the Swift
description: Tournament champion rogue. Fast, lethal, ruthless against rivals.
flavorText: Stand aside. I'll be the hero of this tale.

name: Magus Drevhart
description: Tournament champion mage. Will incinerate anyone in his way — boss, minion, or rival.
flavorText: Witness true power.

name: Rival Monster
description: Foot soldier from a rival dungeon. Chasing the boss kill on behalf of their own dark lord.
flavorText: *snarl*

name: Rival Dungeon Boss
description: A boss from another dungeon, here to settle a score. Goes straight for the throne room.
flavorText: Only one of us walks out.

name: Cartographer Scholar
description: Mapper, not fighter. Tours every room (avoiding the boss), then leaves. Their notes spread to future adventurers.
flavorText: For science.

name: Cosplayer
description: Adventurer in a monster costume. Walks past most minions ignoring them; only fights if attacked.
flavorText: Wait — is that a real beholder, or a really good costume?

name: Loot Goblin
description: Pure thief. Spawns in the boss room and bolts for the exit. Will not stop to fight. Each one that escapes steals 10% of your gold.
flavorText: Snatch and giggle.

name: Cheater
description: Modded client. No-clips walls, teleports between rooms, lands suspicious one-shots. Glass-cannon body — gets reported and banned if they take too many hits.
flavorText: skill issue

name: Sung Jinwoo
description: The Shadow Monarch. Enters alone, raises your fallen minions as his shadow army, and marches on the throne to duel the boss as an equal. Moves twice as fast, shrugs off your defenses, and grows stronger with every shadow he claims.
flavorText: Arise.

name: Paladin
description: Light Party tank. Soaks every hit aimed at the party — minions within his Provoke aura ignore his fragile teammates and swing at his shield instead. Hits like a wet noodle on his own, but his teammates do plenty for him.
flavorText: Hallowed Ground. I yield to none.

name: White Mage
description: Light Party healer. Never attacks — only heals and revives the party. On any ally death, channels a 3-second Raise that brings them back at half HP. Interrupt her and the resurrection fizzles. Kill her and the party crumbles.
flavorText: Stay alive, all of you. I've got you.

name: Samurai
description: Light Party melee DPS. Wind-up iaijutsu strikes that hit twice as hard as a normal blade. Stays at the tank's shoulder, peels for the healer when she's threatened.
flavorText: One cut. One breath.

name: Black Mage
description: Light Party ranged DPS. Lobs spells over the tank's shoulder to hit your back-row minions. Glass cannon — squishy, but every cast lands like a comet. Cast bars are visible; interrupt windows exist.
flavorText: Fire. Blizzard. Thunder. Repeat.

name: Aldric
description: The Nemesis. A young swordsman certain he is the realm's greatest hero, sworn to cut down all evil — starting with you. Returns stronger every act, learns your dungeon, and disdains your treasure. Cannot be slain until the final duel.
flavorText: I came as a student. I return as a king.
